instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies using SysML for system modeling, Architecture Description Languages (ADLs) such as AADL, ACME, and MontiArc for component & connector perspectives, and tools like MathWorks Simulink for behavior simulation. Methodologies including RFLP, OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT manage abstraction levels across requirements, functional, logical, and product/technical layers, ensuring compliance with industry standards and interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders."
]
